summary: All 7 critical issues fixed. (1) ProjectDropdown: replaced static `import { open } from '@tauri-apps/plugin-dialog'` with a dynamic import inside handleOpenProject, matching the pattern used in TitleBar.tsx and MenuBar.tsx. (2) SessionBranchTree: replaced inner <button> (nested inside outer <button>) with <div role='button' tabIndex={0}> including keyboard handler and aria-expanded/aria-label attributes. (3) MemoryBrowserPanel: deleted the file — it was never imported anywhere in the application. (4) WorkspaceStep / OnboardingFlow: replaced hardcoded '~/Projects' with a reactive signal initialised via onMount that dynamically imports '@tauri-apps/api/path' and calls homeDir(), with a try/catch fallback for web mode. (5) ProviderStep OAuth no-op: added TODO comments with the correct invoke call signatures, and disabled OAuth and Configure buttons (opacity-40 + cursor-not-allowed + disabled attribute + tooltip 'Coming soon') so users are not misled into clicking non-functional controls. (6) ProjectHub useLayout() in handler: moved `openSettings` destructure to component top level alongside the other hook calls, removed the illegal in-handler useLayout() call. (7) ProjectHub loading/empty states: added loading spinner (animate-spin) shown while isLoadingProjects() is true, and an empty state with Folder icon + 'No recent projects' message shown when loading is complete and orderedProjects() is empty. Also fixed a second static `import { open }` in ProjectHub.tsx to use dynamic import. `npx tsc --noEmit` exits 0.
